description: Non-linear polynomial model with regime conditioning. Linear weights operate on normalized [0,1] inputs, sigmoid output. Interaction terms capture value+quality synergy and momentum+risk penalty. Regime modifiers shift factor importance per Chiron regime.

notes.architecture: Polynomial regression with pairwise interactions + quadratic terms + sigmoid activation. Regime conditioning via multiplicative modifiers on linear weights.
notes.value: P/E + P/B + FCF yield. In Trend regime dampened (momentum dominates), in Chop regime amplified (mean-reversion).
notes.quality: ROE + Operating Margin + Debt/Equity. Amplified in Risk-Off and Chop (quality premium).
notes.momentum: Jegadeesh-Titman 12m-1m + Orion score. Heavily amplified in Trend, near-zero in News Shock.
notes.size: Log-market-cap SMB. Dampened in Risk-Off (flight to large-cap safety).
notes.risk: Volatility + liquidity. Amplified in Risk-Off and News Shock (risk aversion dominates).
notes.interaction_valueQuality: Cheap + quality synergy (Buffett premium). Positive weight rewards both being high.
notes.interaction_momentumRisk: High momentum + high risk = dangerous. Negative weight penalizes this combination.
notes.quadratic_terms: Negative weights create diminishing returns — prevents extreme factor scores from dominating linearly.
